headline: Salesforce CEO Marc Benioff Just Declared War On Traditional SaaS
summary: Marc Benioff delivered a bold declaration during Salesforce, Inc‘s quarterly earnings call, arguing that the traditional SaaS model is becoming obsolete. "It's not the end of software," Benioff said. "It's the end of software that makes humans do all the...

headline: Salesforce AI Push Deepens CVS Health Ties As Valuation Discount Widens
summary: Salesforce (NYSE:CRM) expanded its Agentforce Health partnership with CVS Health, described as its largest Agentforce agreement in regulated industries. The company launched a Forward Deployed Engineering partner network with TTEC Digital to support AI agent deployments. Salesforce also extended AI powered customer engagement capabilities across several sectors, including healthcare and other regulated markets. Salesforce, trading at $191.1, has seen mixed share performance, with the stock...

headline: CRM Stock Is Down More Than 30% This Year, But Marc Benioff Says Salesforce's Blowout $11.1 Billion Quarter May Be A 'Sign'
summary: Marc Benioff, Chair and CEO of Salesforce, celebrated the company’s first $11.1 billion quarter by linking the company’s strong financial performance to its 1-1-1 philanthropic model. Benioff highlighted the company’s $6.7 billion operating cash flow and raised revenue guidance of...
